.`7_2_a 30 favorites and a single-page response yields one API call, 30 UNSEEN rows, IDLE, settings updated`()
.`7_2_b 500 favorites issue 10 API calls in 10 batches of 50`()
.`7_2_c 30 favorites with a 250-result response paginates within the batch`()
.`7_2_d pre-existing SEEN row keeps its state on a re-fetch`()
.`7_2_e one batch error yields PARTIAL_SYNC and the floor is NOT updated`()
.`7_2_g zero favorites makes no API calls, no DB writes, and settings stay empty`()
.`7_2_h first sync ever uses today minus 30 days as the floor`()
.`7_2_i subsequent sync uses previous floor plus one day as the new floor`()
.`7_2_j same-day re-open clamps the floor to today so the range is never inverted`()
.`markUnseen records the release ID in the fake DAO`()
.`restoreAllDismissed increments the call counter in the fake DAO`()
.`markUnseen then restoreAllDismissed records both calls in the fake DAO`()
.`7_2_k sync fetches front covers and persists the preview URL on each new release row`()
